Import Planogram from JSON

Upload or paste your planogram JSON data to visualize it in 3D

JSON Format Requirements

  • locationId: Location identifier
  • generationBlueprint: (Optional) Blueprint with direction, expansionStrategy, and rackRules
  • generationBlueprint.direction: primaryAxis (NORTH_SOUTH/EAST_WEST), leftFacing, rightFacing
  • generationBlueprint.rackRules: rackSpacingCm, defaultHeight, rowsPerSide, binsPerRow
  • generationBlueprint.expansionStrategy: doubleSidedUntilRack, thenConvertTo ("singleSided"/"doubleSided")
  • generationBlueprint.layoutStyle: "single_row" or "double_row_aisle" (optional)
  • generationBlueprint.aisleWidthCm: Aisle width in cm for double_row_aisle (optional)
  • Rack positions use origin: center (layout centered at 0,0)
  • layout.racks: Array of racks (sorted by createdDate), each with sides containing rows
  • layout.racks[].createdDate: ISO date string for chronological ordering
  • layout.racks[].sides[].rows[]: Rows containing bins
  • layout.racks[].sides[].rows[].bins[]: Bins with bin_id, aisle, merged flag, and products array
  • layout.aisles: Array of aisle definitions with connected_bins
  • products: Array of product IDs (strings like "P001", "P002")
